error_signature: unable to access n8n via subdomain after VM restart
title: Access issues with n8n subdomain after VM restart
symptom: After restarting the VM, the user could only access n8n via IP:port, not the subdomain. Initially, everything was working fine before the restart.
not_this_if: Accessing n8n works via IP:port without issues
root_cause: The issue arose after restarting the VM, which may have caused Docker to become unresponsive or misconfigured. This led to the inability to access n8n through the subdomain despite the DNS being correctly set.
fix_steps: Pull the latest n8n Docker image
Recreate the n8n container using the updated image
Verify that the subdomain is accessible again
agent_instruction: Pull the latest Docker image for n8n and recreate the container to resolve access issues.
